title: hypericum tetrapterum subsp. undulatum
intro: Hypericum tetrapterum subsp. undulatum, also known as the wavy St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum tetrapterum subsp. undulatum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
